raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year> my husband and I landed at the XXXX, XXXX airport and took a taxi to our hotel. On the way to the hotel, the driver pulled over and a second man approached the car with a portable credit card machine. In order to pay for the taxi, which was estimated at {$40.00}, I put my chip credit card into the machine and entered my pin. ( as Ive had to do on other occasions when traveling. ) The men ( I dont remember which one ) moved the machine around and said that he couldnt get wifi and that it wasnt working. We were asked about other forms of payment, such as an ATM, cash, etc. etc. We told them no to all. During the conversation, the man handed me a receipt for me to fill in. ( see attached ) After much disagreement, my husband told the driver that we have wifi at the hotel and that we would process our credit card for payment when we got there. The driver brought us to our hotel but didnt come in with us to take payment.

After we checked in we talked about being worried that something had happened since he didnt take payment. So I immediately used the hotels wifi to log in to my credit card account. Upon doing so, I saw three cash advances for that day. I immediately called the credit card company to dispute those charges. I was told I couldnt because they were still pending. I asked the company to immediately cancel my card. 
On XX/XX/year> we met up with a XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  who was leading the trip we were about to start on. We told him what had happened and asked him to help us fill out a police report. ( see attached ) After we arrived home and the charges were no longer pending, I called the credit card company to dispute the three cash advances as I did not authorize them. After checking my account, I saw that they had only marked two of them for dispute. Later, when requested, I sent them the police report and asked them again to mark the third one as being disputed.

Upon checking my credit card account, I saw that they had denied my dispute so I called and asked why. They said I gave them my PIN number. I told them I did not give them my PIN number, that I had
entered it into the machine to pay for the taxi. I asked if they had reviewed the police report. They found the report and said they couldnt read it because it was in XXXX. I asked that they review the case again, which they said they would. The third transaction still does not show disputed.

Disputing 3 transactions at XXXX along with the additional fees and interest of XXXX for a total of {$690.00}
